steps.t: Lothon has asked you to look for his companion, Dúnach. You should search Calembel for signs of the missing prison guard.
While searching for Dúnach, you found their body. You should examine the area around the body for any signs of a clue. You found the body in Calembel.
Sadly, while searching for Dúnach, you found their body. After examining the area, a trail of blood was discovered! It looks like Dúnach went down fig…
Following the trail of blood led you to an angry, injured woman. She glares up at you, waiting for you to approach. You should question the injured wo…
Gorneth has confessed to the murder of Dúnach, and given you an accounts book detailing the prison guard's many crimes. She has asked that you pass th…
